title: juglans procera
intro: Juglans procera, also known as Himalayan walnut, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayan region and parts of the Indian subcontinent. The plant's bark, leaves, and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juglans procera include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
